name: Date Chewsticks
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat eggs and sugar until well combined.
2. Add baking powder, vanilla, and flour to the egg mixture. Mix thoroughly.
3. Gently fold in the dates until fully incorporated into the batter.
4. Pour the batter into a greased 8 x 8 pan.
5. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 25 to 30 minutes or until set.
6. Allow the chewsticks to cool completely.
7. Sprinkle icing sugar over the top of the cooled chewsticks and rub it in until fully coated.
Note: Double the recipe and bake in a 9 x 13 pan if desired. The baking time will increase by about 10-15 minutes. For added elegance, use candied fruit instead of dates or place a paper doily on top before sprinkling with icing sugar.
